title: fagus sylvatica var. ferruginea
intro: Fagus sylvatica var. ferruginea, also known as the copper beech, is a deciduous tree that is a variety of the common beech tree. It is known for its distinctive copper-colored leaves, which are rich in antioxidants and have been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Fagus sylvatica var. ferruginea include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The tree can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being by reducing inflammation and improving digestion.
